text:
it doesn't a bug but i don't know to ask who.
my machine, HP ProLiant DL380p Gen8 128GB Ram, have occurred message
while booting, bge0 watchdog timeout. it cannot use a ping command and
sometime it was frozen. i see on this page ..
http://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/stable/9/sys/dev/bge/?pathrev=243546,
but i don't know a step how to fix it. i would like to use FreeBSD.
Thank so much.
